extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports no criminal proceedings against the Company, Directors, Promoters, Subsidiary, or KMPs/SMPs, while it reports 9 criminal proceedings by the Company; the 9 By-company matters were excluded. Regulatory/statutory actions against the Company total 2, with no such actions against the other listed entities, and tax proceedings against the Company and Subsidiary total 21 + 1 = 22; promoter and KMP/SMP tax matters were excluded. The quantified aggregate against the Company and Subsidiary is the table's Company tax amount of ₹2,645.85 lakhs plus Subsidiary tax amount of ₹0.43 lakhs, totaling ₹2,646.28 lakhs, or ₹26.4628 crore; the separate promoter and KMP/SMP amounts and all By matters were excluded. Contingent liabilities use the explicitly stated consolidated total of ₹2,575.60 lakhs as of December 31, 2024, converted to ₹25.756 crore, rather than summing line items. Company-wide customer concentration for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2024, is based on revenue from operations: top five customers were 38.43% and top ten customers were 51.88%; the source monetary tables use ₹ lakhs, converted to crore by dividing by 100.
